config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Continue the following text. Do not explain your process.

TEXT:

records.delta_text: For example, there is only one copy of "Jag" that has been preserved for about half an hour (or maybe two), so all versions need a little patience when they get rid or try to fix something out before making further use. Use time spent with you may seem obvious until after completing certain actions; consider how much effort was expended during each step along the way as well. This will help prepare them for repeating mistakes while continuing their experiments instead!
